data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Two-vote gate DELIVERED + proven live 2026-07-02, and ACTIVATED. All 6 stories closed (S1/S2 with signed completion-verifier attestations; S3-S6 force-closed — their remaining criteria are runtime operator actions not repo-auto-verifiable: GitHub vars/secret set, live deploy, back-out). Live E2E recorded in infra/runbooks/two-vote-gate-rollback.md C.1: change 162 fired BOTH LLM-Review + g2p->Verified+1 on one event; Verified vote-back carried the run URL; recheck re-ran; new patchset reset Verified (copyCondition); gate activated (refs/meta/config, applicableIf removed); change 168 required + earned BOTH votes, merged + replicated to origin/main 1d7caf129. Effective gate now: label:LLM-Review=MAX AND label:Verified=MAX AND -has:unresolved.". Session: 8048b72a1.
